Useful details

You can prepare this information

01

Who it is for

Family member, patient, several patients or a care facility.

02

Mobility

Walks, needs support, remains seated or is in bed.

03

Size

Share the current size or select that it is unknown.

04

Usage

Daily, weekly or monthly average if available.

05

Products

Diapers, underpads, gloves, wipes or other supplies.

06

Delivery area

General area in Panama for coordination.

WhatsApp support

Every form on the site prepares a message for the same support channel.

+507 6200-2765

Short form

Prepare a summary before contacting us

Step 1 of 3

  1. Basic details
  2. Need
  3. Frequency and summary
Basic details

Facility details

Need

Measure waist and hips in centimetres and keep both values. The exact chart will be checked against the available product.
Additional products
Frequency and summary

Review your summary

You can go back and edit any answer before opening WhatsApp.


    

  

    

  
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
Should I send medical information?
No. Avoid diagnoses, medical records, clinical photographs or sensitive information that is unnecessary for a quotation.
Does the form send data to a server?
No. The form prepares the text in your browser and opens WhatsApp. A temporary draft may be stored for the current session so you do not lose your entries.
Tell us what you need
We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
Talk on WhatsApp

  


  

    

      
      
      
      
Guidance and quotations for everyday senior care supplies in Panama.
